title: Access the authenticated app after signing in
description: A returning user can sign in from the login page and reach the authenticated app.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated app is displayed

title: Sign up and enter the authenticated app
description: A new user can create an account from the login page and reach the authenticated app.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated app is displayed

title: Add work experience and save the resume
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can add work experience in the editor and save the resume successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add a work experience entry in the resume editor
Verify a save confirmation is visible
Verify the work experience entry is retained

title: Create a new resume and save it from the editor
description: An authenticated user can create a new resume from resume management, enter the editor, save it, and return to the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter the editor for the new resume
Verify the new resume appears in the resume list

title: Export a saved resume from the editor
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can export a resume from the editor after making edits.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the resume remains available in the editor

title: Edit personal details and work experience in the editor
description: An authenticated user can update personal details and work experience in an existing resume and save the changes.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing resume in the editor
Verify the updated resume content is displayed

title: Create a new resume from the list
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can create a new resume from the resume list and open it in the editor.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the resume editor is displayed
Verify a new resume is ready to edit

title: Stay signed in while moving directly to protected areas
description: A signed-in user can land on protected routes directly and remain authenticated across dashboard and resume management navigation.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the dashboard overview is displayed
Verify the resume list is displayed

title: Edit personal details in the resume editor
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can update personal details in the resume editor and keep the edited information visible before saving.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Edit the personal details in the resume editor
Verify the personal details section is displayed
Verify the updated personal details are visible

title: Review the dashboard and open resume management
description: An authenticated user can view the dashboard overview and navigate to resume management.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the dashboard overview is displayed
Click the navigation link to resume management
Verify the resume list is displayed

title: Open the resume list and see saved resumes
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can open resume management and view existing resumes.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the resume list is displayed

title: Return to the resume list after saving in the editor
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can save changes in the editor and return to the resume list afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the resume list is displayed
Verify the saved resume appears in the list

title: Move between dashboard and resume management while signed in
description: An authenticated user can use the dashboard navigation to move to resume management and back without losing access.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to resume management
Verify the resume list is displayed
Click the navigation link to the dashboard
Verify the dashboard overview is displayed

title: Delete a resume and see the list update
description: A returning user can delete an existing resume from the list and confirm the list refreshes afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the resume list updates after deletion

title: Visit the landing page and start sign in
description: A visitor can view the landing page and navigate into the sign-in experience from a primary call to action.

steps.description: Verify the product overview is displayed
Click the primary call to action to start
Verify the sign-in page is displayed
